/usr/bin/ar qc libai-sdk-core.a "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/error/ai_error.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/error/api_call_error.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/util/json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/schema/json_schema.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/schema/validator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/stream/sse_parser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/http/client.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/http/connection_pool.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/http/multipart.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/http/websocket.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/core/generate_text.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/core/stream_text.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/core/generate_object.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/core/embed.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/agent/tool_loop_agent.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/tool/tool_set.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/model/middleware.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/mcp/mcp_client.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/mcp/mcp_sse_transport.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/telemetry/telemetry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/util/token_count.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/util/rate_limiter.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/stream/data_stream.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/core/generate_image.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/core/generate_speech.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/core/transcribe.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-core-static.dir/src/core/rerank.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libai-sdk-core.a
